title: Ahmədbəyli Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Əhmədbəyli with a Z-Score of +3.03. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Əhmədbəyli is causing extremely high temperatures. 
The relative humidity is at 41% and wind speed is 25.8 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
CDD is at 9.6 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
